title: Las Emociones
author: Luna 📚
learningObjectives: Express how they feel using 'Estoy...' sentences
Understand that all emotions are valid

seo.metaDescription: Learn emotions in Spanish! Interactive preschool book teaching children to identify and express feelings - feliz, triste, enojado, asustado, sorprendido, cansado, and emocionado. Free Spanish book for kids ages 2-5.
seo.ogTitle: Las Emociones - Learn Feelings in Spanish for Kids
seo.ogDescription: Interactive Spanish book teaching preschoolers to identify and express emotions: feliz, triste, enojado, asustado, and more. Free online book!

educationalValue.cognitive: Helps children identify and name feelings

parentTips: Ask your child 'Como te sientes?' (How do you feel?) throughout the day
Point to the emojis and have them practice the Spanish words
Share times when you felt each emotion
Reinforce that all emotions are okay to feel
